title: Skelly Archer
description: This is mobs from my rpg style adventure map I'm working on.
body:
**Other Information:** This is sneak peak for mini-story adverture map, this mob along with other custom mobs and custom assets for decore will be apart of this rpg style adventure.

**Information/Introductions**: I’m a pixel-artist/3d-modeler with 3-4 years of experience, and have a similar art style to Noxcrew and Mojang. If you plan on reusing this assets for your own private or public resource packs is allowed, all I ask is credit must be given where it's due.

My Discord Server: https://discord.gg/UgQwjgxDCN](https://discord.gg/UgQwjgxDCN
